steps.title: Recognize that we're isolating the expression, not solving for x
steps.content: The question asks for the value of $2(x - 9)$, not $x$. Notice that this expression already appears in the given equation $48 = 18 + 2(x - 9)$. We can isolate it directly without expanding or solving for the variable.

steps.title: Isolate 2(x - 9) by subtracting 18
steps.content:
From $48 = 18 + 2(x - 9)$, subtract 18 from both sides:
$$48 - 18 = 2(x - 9)$$
$$30 = 2(x - 9)$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
